title: DataGrid not displaying team_type correctly
symptom: After refreshing the page, the 'team_type' field shows 'undefined' instead of the expected value.
applies_when: Using DataGrid to display data from Xano
Page is refreshed or data is reloaded
not_this_if: Data is displayed correctly without refresh
Issue occurs in a different component
root_cause: The issue arises because the value for 'team_type' was incorrectly set in the cell's Initial Value field instead of the appropriate column settings in the DataGrid element. This misconfiguration leads to the data not being displayed correctly after a refresh.
fix_steps: Navigate to the column settings for 'team_type'
Set the value correctly in the column settings
Save the changes and refresh the page
agent_instruction: Configure the 'team_type' value in the DataGrid column settings instead of the Initial Value field.
